quicksight.analysis.filter.CfnAbout:
With a `Filter`, you can remove portions of data from a particular visual or view.

This is a union type structure. For this structure to be valid, only one of the attributes can be defined.

quicksight.analysis.filter.CategoryFilte.Description: A `CategoryFilter` filters text values.  For more information, see [Adding text filters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/add-a-text-filter-data-prep.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.filter.NumericEquali.Description: A `NumericEqualityFilter` filters numeric values that equal or do not equal a given numeric value.

quicksight.analysis.filter.NumericRangeF.Description: A `NumericRangeFilter` filters numeric values that are either inside or outside a given numeric range.

quicksight.analysis.filter.RelativeDates.Description: A `RelativeDatesFilter` filters date values that are relative to a given date.

quicksight.analysis.filter.TimeEqualityF.Description: A `TimeEqualityFilter` filters date-time values that equal or do not equal a given date/time value.

quicksight.analysis.filter.TimeRangeFilt.Description: A `TimeRangeFilter` filters date-time values that are either inside or outside a given date/time range.

quicksight.analysis.filter.TopBottomFilt.Description: A `TopBottomFilter` filters data to the top or bottom values for a given column.
